message:
fix: warn on Dolt endpoint drift during auto-start (GH#2399)

When auto-start allocates a new ephemeral port because the configured port
is unreachable, bd now warns with the old and new port numbers and suggests
pinning via dolt.port in config.yaml. Also logs when port file is updated
to a different value.

This makes endpoint drift visible instead of silent, addressing the split-brain
scenario where other tools/agents still expect the old port.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
